case_title: THE FRENCH PARADOX CORP. VS FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $408.99 FILED BY THE FRENCH PARADOX CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE FRENCH PARADOX CORP. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
